sig.name: Perkumpulan Civil Prasetiya Mulya (PGPM)
sig.shortDescription: Alumni of the Prasetiya Mulya Graduate Program in Management connecting across cohorts.
sig.longDescription: The PGPM Network brings together graduates of the flagship management program for peer mentorship, leadership roundtables, and cross-industry collaboration.

sig.name: Saham Club
sig.shortDescription: An equities-focused circle sharing research, theses, and portfolio ideas.
sig.longDescription: Saham Club members swap equity research, debate investment theses, and run a paper-trading league.

sig.name: Branding Club
sig.shortDescription: Alumni passionate about brand strategy, marketing, and communications.
sig.longDescription: The Branding Club connects alumni working in brand management, marketing, and creative communications for knowledge sharing and collaboration.

sig.name: Coaching Club
sig.shortDescription: A community of alumni coaches and mentors sharing best practices.
sig.longDescription: The Coaching Club brings together certified coaches and mentors among alumni to share techniques, practice peer coaching, and develop leadership capabilities.

sig.name: Culinary Club
sig.shortDescription: Food lovers exploring restaurants, home cooking, and the F&B business.
sig.longDescription: The Culinary Club gathers alumni foodies for tasting tours, cooking classes, and conversations with alumni running F&B ventures.

sig.name: Cycling Club
sig.shortDescription: Road and mountain biking enthusiasts riding together every weekend.
sig.longDescription: The Cycling Club organizes weekend group rides, charity cycling events, and bike touring trips for alumni who love two wheels.

sig.name: Digital Club
sig.shortDescription: Digital transformation, e-commerce, and tech innovation discussions.
sig.longDescription: The Digital Club focuses on digital transformation strategies, e-commerce trends, and technology innovation for business growth.

sig.name: Financial Club
sig.shortDescription: Markets, personal finance, and investing discussions led by alumni in finance.
sig.longDescription: The Financial Club hosts monthly market briefings, personal-finance workshops, and guest sessions with alumni working across banking, asset management, and fintech.

sig.name: Fintech Club
sig.shortDescription: Exploring financial technology innovations and disruptions.
sig.longDescription: The Fintech Club brings together alumni in financial technology to discuss innovations, regulatory developments, and startup opportunities.

sig.name: Gamers Club
sig.shortDescription: Gaming enthusiasts connecting through esports and game nights.
sig.longDescription: The Gamers Club organizes esports tournaments, casual game nights, and discussions about the gaming industry.

sig.name: Health Club
sig.shortDescription: Promoting wellness, fitness, and healthy lifestyles among alumni.
sig.longDescription: The Health Club focuses on holistic wellness including fitness challenges, nutrition workshops, and mental health awareness.

sig.name: Investor Club
sig.shortDescription: Angel investing, venture capital, and private equity discussions.
sig.longDescription: The Investor Club connects alumni interested in angel investing, venture capital, and private equity opportunities.

sig.name: Leadership Club
sig.shortDescription: Developing leadership skills and executive presence among alumni.
sig.longDescription: The Leadership Club provides a platform for alumni to develop leadership capabilities through workshops, executive coaching, and peer learning.

sig.name: Mining & Energy Club
sig.shortDescription: Alumni in mining, energy, and natural resources sectors.
sig.longDescription: The Mining & Energy Club connects alumni working in mining, oil & gas, renewable energy, and natural resources sectors.

sig.name: Music Club
sig.shortDescription: Music lovers and performers sharing their passion for music.
sig.longDescription: The Music Club brings together alumni who love music for jam sessions, concerts, and music appreciation events.

sig.name: Photographer Club
sig.shortDescription: Photography enthusiasts sharing tips, techniques, and photo walks.
sig.longDescription: The Photographer Club organizes photo walks, workshops, and exhibitions for alumni passionate about photography.

sig.name: Prazmall Marketplace
sig.shortDescription: A marketplace for alumni businesses to connect and collaborate.
sig.longDescription: Prasmul Marketplace is a platform where alumni can showcase their businesses, find partners, and access exclusive deals from fellow alumni.

sig.name: Property Club
sig.shortDescription: Real estate and property investment discussions and networking.
sig.longDescription: The Property Club connects alumni interested in real estate development, property investment, and urban planning.

sig.name: Runners Club
sig.shortDescription: Weekly runs, race meet-ups, and a community that keeps each other moving.
sig.longDescription: Building healthier lives and stronger bonds, one run at a time.

sig.name: Tourism Club
sig.shortDescription: Travel enthusiasts exploring destinations and tourism businesses.
sig.longDescription: The Tourism Club organizes group trips, travel meetups, and discussions about the tourism and hospitality industry.

sig.name: Traders Club
sig.shortDescription: Active traders sharing strategies, analysis, and market insights.
sig.longDescription: The Traders Club connects alumni who actively trade stocks, forex, and commodities for strategy sharing and market analysis.

sig.name: UMKM & Koperasi Club
sig.shortDescription: Supporting small businesses and cooperatives among alumni.
sig.longDescription: The UMKM & Koperasi Club supports alumni with small and medium enterprises through mentoring, access to capital, and business development.

sig.name: Urban Farming Club
sig.shortDescription: Promoting urban agriculture and sustainable living practices.
sig.longDescription: The Urban Farming Club encourages alumni to explore urban agriculture, sustainable food production, and green living.

sig.name: Writers Club
sig.shortDescription: Writers, authors, and content creators sharing their craft.
sig.longDescription: The Writers Club brings together alumni who write professionally or as a hobby for workshops, book clubs, and publishing discussions.

sig.name: Supply Chain Club
sig.shortDescription: Supply chain and logistics professionals sharing industry knowledge.
sig.longDescription: The Supply Chain Club connects alumni in logistics, procurement, and supply chain management for knowledge sharing and career development.

sig.name: CEO Club
sig.shortDescription: CEOs and top executives networking and sharing leadership insights.
sig.longDescription: The CEO Club is an exclusive circle for alumni serving as CEOs and top executives to share leadership insights and build strategic relationships.

sig.name: Komunitas Alumni Entrepreneur
sig.shortDescription: Entrepreneurs building and scaling businesses together.
sig.longDescription: Komunitas Alumni Entrepreneur connects alumni entrepreneurs for mentoring, collaboration, and access to resources for business growth.

sig.name: Komunitas Alumni Marketing
sig.shortDescription: Marketing professionals sharing strategies and industry trends.
sig.longDescription: Komunitas Alumni Marketing brings together marketing professionals to discuss the latest strategies, tools, and industry trends.

sig.name: Komunitas Buzzer
sig.shortDescription: Social media influencers and digital content creators among alumni.
sig.longDescription: Komunitas Buzzer connects alumni who are social media influencers and content creators for collaboration and knowledge sharing.

story.title: From Campus to Category Leader
story.excerpt: How one graduate turned a thesis project into a market-defining agritech venture.
story.body:
Every alumni journey starts with a single decision. For this graduate, it was a conviction that good business and good values are not at odds — and a willingness to start before everything was certain.

Years on, the lessons learned on campus still echo: rigor, humility, and a bias toward building. The path was not linear, but the network of fellow alumni made each turn feel less lonely.

Today, that journey is a story worth sharing — not because the destination is final, but because the road might inspire the next graduate to take their own first step.

business.name: Kopi Prasmul
business.shortDescription: Brewing quality coffee, building meaningful connections.
business.description:
Founded by an alumnus who saw a gap the market kept ignoring, this venture pairs disciplined operations with a clear sense of purpose. What began as a small team has grown into a trusted brand serving customers across the region.

The company stays close to the Prasmul community — hiring alumni, mentoring student teams, and partnering with fellow alumni businesses.
